author: nflaig
content: We've merged this now and lodestar will append the client info to the user graffiti if there is enough space left, there was no strong push back on this from the community so we decided it's worth the effort to support using the graffiti to track client diversity more accurately. Few things that are worth pointing out, is that (1) we should definitely not truncate the user graffiti to fit client info and (2) there should be an option for the user to opt out of this behavior, we just added a simple CLI flag for this, we already have a `--private` flag to hide client info across the whole stack, also on p2p. Now we just need to cut a new release (v1.45.0) and we should slowly see this on mainnet, will probably be out in 2-3 weeks.
